name: stress-regression
description: Twenty-turn Thorn/Lyra regression with forced routing, location changes, compaction, continuation, and undo.

events.speech: Keep your voice down, Lyra. Someone has been watching us since we entered
events.action: I set the faintly glowing medallion on the table, but keep two fingers over it while I scan the tavern

events.speech: Tell me what the medallion is doing, in plain words
events.action: I slide the medallion toward Lyra and turn my chair so I can watch both the door and the hooded stranger

events.speech: You in the hood. If you want something, ask before my patience runs out
events.action: I raise one hand toward the stranger without drawing my sword

events.speech: Lyra, stop. That symbol belongs to the old Iron Guard
events.action: I pull the medallion back and study its markings under the candlelight

events.speech: My brother carried this mark on his last patrol. Where did you find it?
events.action: I lean across the table, staring at Lyra more intensely than I intended

events.speech: Mork, bar the door. Nobody leaves until we understand what is happening
events.action: I stand, move between the patrons and Lyra, and rest my hand on the hilt of my sword

events.speech: If the forest sent this thing here, waiting inside will not make us safer
events.action: I wrap the medallion in a scrap of cloth and secure it inside my armor

events.speech: Pack only what you need. We leave through the kitchen
events.action: I check the rear corridor for an ambush and signal Lyra to follow

events.speech: Stay close. The rain will hide us, but it will hide anyone following us too
events.action: I push open the kitchen exit and step into the alley, shielding my eyes from the rain

events.speech: There, by the drain. The same symbol again
events.action: I crouch beside a fresh mark scratched into the stone and compare it with the medallion

events.speech: Can you trace the magic without touching it?
events.action: I hold the wrapped medallion near the scratched symbol while keeping it out of Lyra's reach

events.speech: Then we follow the trail, but we do it my way: slowly
events.action: I lead us north through the narrow streets, checking every rooftop and doorway

events.speech: That bell has rung three times, but the tower is empty
events.action: I stop beneath the abandoned watchtower and listen for movement above us

events.speech: Lyra, light the smallest spell you have. No fireworks
events.action: I draw my sword and enter the watchtower ahead of her

events.speech: These are Iron Guard orders. My unit was sent into the forest on a lie
events.action: I lift a water-damaged dispatch from the floor and read it beside Lyra's light

events.speech: I blamed myself for years. Someone arranged that ambush
events.action: My sword lowers as I hand the dispatch to Lyra, no longer hiding that my hands are shaking

events.speech: We finish this. At dawn, we take the north road
events.action: I fold the dispatch, place it beside the medallion, and search the room for supplies

events.speech: Do you hear scratching behind that wall?
events.action: I press my ear to the loose boards, then motion for Lyra to stand back

events.speech: On my count, break the ward. I will handle whatever comes through
events.action: I brace in front of Lyra with my sword raised and count down from three

events.speech: That map leads straight into the corrupted forest. So does the truth
events.action: I spread the hidden map across a crate, mark our route at first light, and finally sheath my sword

events.speech: Before we leave, tell me the three facts we cannot afford to forget.
events.action: I point in turn to the medallion, the Iron Guard dispatch, and the route marked on the hidden map.
